import * as THREE from 'https://unpkg.com/three@0.166.1/build/three.module.js'; // ── constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const SPEED = 1; const ms = n => n / SPEED; const sleep = n => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms(n))); const $ = id => document.getElementById(id); // scene positions const LX = -5, LZ = 0; // local main building const BX = -5, BZ = 2.8; // branch building const RX = 5, RZ = 0; // remote cluster center // colors const C_BODY = 0xbec2d4; const C_MAIN = 0xa78bfa; const C_FEAT = 0x34d399; const C_MERGE = 0xfbbf24; const C_REMOTE = 0x9ca3b5; const C_GROUND = 0x161a25; const C_ROAD = 0x1e2436; const C_PLAT_L = 0x1b2133; const C_PLAT_R = 0x181e2e; // ── Three.js setup ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const stage = $('stage'); const canvas = $('city-canvas'); const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ canvas, antialias: true }); renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(devicePixelRatio, 2)); renderer.setClearColor(0x0e1016); const scene = new THREE.Scene(); // orthographic isometric camera const FRUST = 4.2; let aspect = stage.clientWidth / stage.clientHeight; const camera = new THREE.OrthographicCamera( -FRUST * aspect, FRUST * aspect, FRUST, -FRUST, 0.1, 200 ); camera.position.set(14, 14, 14); camera.lookAt(0, 0.5, 0); // lighting scene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0x4a4e6a, 2.2)); const sun = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 2.8); sun.position.set(8, 12, 6); scene.add(sun); const fill = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0x7080a0, 1.0); fill.position.set(-6, 4, -8); scene.add(fill); // ── static geometry (ground, road) ─────────────────────────────────────────── function staticBox(w, h, d, color, px, py, pz) { const m = new THREE.Mesh( new THREE.BoxGeometry(w, h, d), new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color }) ); m.position.set(px, py, pz); scene.add(m); return m; } staticBox(24, 0.10, 14, C_GROUND, 0, -0.05, 0); // world floor staticBox( 6, 0.12, 3, C_ROAD, 0, 0, 0); // road strip between districts // ── story-object tracking ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── let story = []; function tracked(obj) { story.push(obj); scene.add(obj); return obj; } function disposeGroup(g) { g.traverse(c => { if (c.isMesh) { c.geometry.dispose(); if (Array.isArray(c.material)) c.material.forEach(m => m.dispose()); else c.material.dispose(); } }); } // ── building helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function mat(color) { return new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({ color }); } // Creates a box whose BOTTOM sits at local y=0, so scale.y grows upward function bottomBox(w, h, d, color) { const geo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(w, h, d); geo.translate(0, h / 2, 0); return new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat(color)); } // A floor group: body + thin accent cap, bottom at y=0 function makeFloor(w, h, d, bodyColor, capColor) { const g = new THREE.Group(); g.add(bottomBox(w, h - 0.08, d, bodyColor)); const cap = bottomBox(w + 0.06, 0.09, d + 0.06, capColor); cap.position.y = h - 0.08; g.add(cap); return g; } // Animate scale.y from near-0 to 1 with slight overshoot function riseGroup(group, dur = 700) { return new Promise(resolve => { group.scale.y = 0.001; const t0 = performance.now(); function tick() { const raw = Math.min((performance.now() - t0) / ms(dur), 1); let s = raw < 0.62 ? (raw / 0.62) * 1.09 : 1.09 - ((raw - 0.62) / 0.38) * 0.09; group.scale.y = Math.max(0.001, s); if (raw < 1) requestAnimationFrame(tick); else { group.scale.y = 1; resolve(); } } requestAnimationFrame(tick); }); } // Add a floor at baseY on top of any existing stack async function addFloor(wx, wz, baseY, floorH, bodyColor, capColor) { const g = makeFloor(0.85, floorH, 0.85, bodyColor, capColor); g.position.set(wx, baseY, wz); tracked(g); await riseGroup(g, 680); return g; } // ── platform helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── async function risePlatform(px, pz, w, d, color) { const g = new THREE.Group(); const geo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(w, 0.14, d); geo.translate(0, 0.07, 0); g.add(new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat(color))); g.position.set(px, 0, pz); tracked(g); await riseGroup(g, 550); return g; } // ── bridge / connector ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── async function riseConnector(ax, ay, az, bx, by, bz, color) { const dx = bx - ax, dy = by - ay, dz = bz - az; const len = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz); const g = new THREE.Group(); const geo = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.22, 0.22, len); geo.translate(0, 0, len / 2); // origin at one end g.add(new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat(color))); g.position.set(ax, ay, az); g.lookAt(bx, by, bz); tracked(g); // grow scale.z from 0 to 1 return new Promise(resolve => { g.scale.z = 0.001; const t0 = performance.now(); function tick() { const raw = Math.min((performance.now() - t0) / ms(650), 1); const t = raw < 0.5 ? 2*raw*raw : -1 + (4 - 2*raw)*raw; g.scale.z = Math.max(0.001, t); if (raw < 1) requestAnimationFrame(tick); else { g.scale.z = 1; resolve(); } } requestAnimationFrame(tick); }); } // ── particle travel ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── async function travelParticles(sx, sy, sz, ex, ey, ez, count, color) { const geoS = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.14, 7, 7); const start = new THREE.Vector3(sx, sy, sz); const end = new THREE.Vector3(ex, ey, ez); const promises = []; for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) { if (i > 0) await sleep(190); const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geoS.clone(), mat(color)); mesh.position.copy(start); scene.add(mesh); promises.push(new Promise(res => { const t0 = performance.now(); const dur = ms(1100); function tick() { const raw = Math.min((performance.now() - t0) / dur, 1); const t = raw < 0.5 ? 2*raw*raw : -1 + (4-2*raw)*raw; mesh.position.lerpVectors(start, end, t); mesh.position.y = start.y + Math.sin(raw * Math.PI) * 2.2; if (raw < 1) requestAnimationFrame(tick); else { scene.remove(mesh); mesh.geometry.dispose(); mesh.material.dispose(); res(); } } requestAnimationFrame(tick); })); } await Promise.all(promises); } // ── camera pan ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const camTarget = new THREE.Vector3(0, 0.5, 0); const CAM_OFFSET = new THREE.Vector3(14, 14, 14); function panTo(tx, ty, tz, dur = 900) { return new Promise(resolve => { const from = camTarget.clone(); const to = new THREE.Vector3(tx, ty, tz); const t0 = performance.now(); function tick() { const raw = Math.min((performance.now() - t0) / ms(dur), 1); const t = raw < 0.5 ? 2*raw*raw : -1 + (4-2*raw)*raw; camTarget.lerpVectors(from, to, t); camera.position.copy(camTarget).add(CAM_OFFSET); camera.lookAt(camTarget); if (raw < 1) requestAnimationFrame(tick); else resolve(); } requestAnimationFrame(tick); }); } // ── terminal ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── let typeToken = 0; async function type(text) { const tok = ++typeToken; $('cmd').textContent = ''; for (const ch of text) { if (tok !== typeToken) return; $('cmd').textContent += ch; await sleep(38); } } function clearTerm() { typeToken++; $('cmd').textContent = ''; } function say(html) { $('caption').innerHTML = html; } function setPath(p, branch = '') { const el = $('term-path'); el.textContent = p + (branch ? ' ' : ''); if (branch) { const s = document.createElement('span'); s.className = 'branch-indicator'; s.textContent = '(' + branch + ')'; el.appendChild(s); } } // ── resize ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function onResize() { const w = stage.clientWidth, h = stage.clientHeight; aspect = w / h; camera.left = -FRUST * aspect; camera.right = FRUST * aspect; camera.top = FRUST; camera.bottom = -FRUST; camera.updateProjectionMatrix(); renderer.setSize(w, h, false); } window.addEventListener('resize', onResize); onResize(); // ── render loop ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── (function animate() { requestAnimationFrame(animate); renderer.render(scene, camera); })(); // ── reset ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── let localH = 0; // current height of main local stack function resetScene() { story.forEach(g => { scene.remove(g); disposeGroup(g); }); story = []; localH = 0; $('lbl-remote').className = 'dist-label'; $('lbl-remote').textContent = 'Remote — not connected'; $('replay').classList.remove('show'); $('cursor').style.display = ''; clearTerm(); say(''); setPath('~'); camTarget.set(0, 0.5, 0); camera.position.copy(camTarget).add(CAM_OFFSET); camera.lookAt(camTarget); } // ── main sequence ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── async function run() { resetScene(); await sleep(700); // ── Beat 1: empty lots ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── say('Every developer starts here — an empty folder on their machine, and a blank slot on GitHub waiting to be filled.'); panTo(-1.5, 0.5, 0, 600); await sleep(3400); // ── Beat 2: git init ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── clearTerm(); say('git init pours the foundation. A hidden .git/ folder appears — the engine that will track every change from this moment on.'); await type('mkdir git-learning-log && cd git-learning-log'); setPath('~/git-learning-log'); await sleep(400); clearTerm(); await type('git init'); await sleep(300); await risePlatform(LX, LZ + 1.4, 4.2, 5.4, C_PLAT_L); setPath('~/git-learning-log', 'main'); await sleep(2600); // ── Beat 3: first commit ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── clearTerm(); say('Your first commit. A snapshot of learning-log.md, saved forever. The first building rises on your block.'); await type('git add learning-log.md'); await sleep(500); clearTerm(); await type('git commit -m "Add initial learning log"'); await sleep(350); await addFloor(LX, LZ, 0, 0.95, C_BODY, C_MAIN); localH = 0.95; await sleep(2500); // ── Beat 4: second commit ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── clearTerm(); say('Every new commit adds a floor. The building grows — so does your history.'); await type('git commit -m "Add What I Learned section"'); await sleep(350); await addFloor(LX, LZ, localH, 0.80, C_BODY, C_MAIN); localH += 0.80; await sleep(2400); // ── Beat 5: branch ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── clearTerm(); say('A new idea. Instead of risking the main building, you branch — a fresh construction site on a side street, completely separate.'); await type('git checkout -b add-resources'); await sleep(500); setPath('~/git-learning-log', 'add-resources'); // fork road from main to branch position await riseConnector(LX - 0.42, 0.13, LZ, LX - 0.42, 0.13, BZ - 0.42, C_FEAT); await sleep(2500); // ── Beat 6: commits on both branches ─────────────────────────────────────── clearTerm(); say('Two branches, two buildings under construction — simultaneously. The same .git/ folder holds both timelines safely.'); await type('git commit -m "Expand learning notes on branches"'); await sleep(350); const branchP = addFloor(BX, BZ, 0, 1.10, C_BODY, C_FEAT); // switch to main and commit there too await sleep(300); clearTerm(); await type('git checkout main'); setPath('~/git-learning-log', 'main'); await sleep(300); clearTerm(); await type('git commit -m "Rewrite with time machine analogy"'); await sleep(300); const mainP = addFloor(LX, LZ, localH, 0.72, C_BODY, C_MAIN); await Promise.all([branchP, mainP]); localH += 0.72; await sleep(2500); // ── Beat 7: merge ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── clearTerm(); say('git merge resolves the conflict and weaves both timelines into one. A bridge connects the two buildings — both lines of work preserved.'); await type('git merge add-resources'); await sleep(600); // bridge from top of main building across to branch building top const bridgeY = localH + 0.18; const branchTopY = 1.10 + 0.18; await riseConnector(LX, bridgeY, LZ + 0.42, BX, branchTopY, BZ - 0.42, C_MERGE); await sleep(2700); // ── Beat 8: git push ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── clearTerm(); say('git push ships your entire history to GitHub. Watch the commits travel across.'); await type('git remote add origin https://github.com/you/git-learning-log.git'); await sleep(600); $('lbl-remote').className = 'dist-label connected'; $('lbl-remote').textContent = 'Remote — github.com'; clearTerm(); await type('git push -u origin main'); await sleep(400); // pan slightly toward road midpoint panTo(0, 1.2, 0, 800); await travelParticles(LX + 0.42, localH * 0.5 + 0.3, LZ, RX - 0.5, 1, RZ, 3, C_MAIN); // remote district platform + buildings appear await risePlatform(RX, RZ, 3.8, 4.2, C_PLAT_R); await addFloor(RX - 0.9, RZ - 0.6, 0, 1.50, C_REMOTE, C_MAIN); await sleep(130); await addFloor(RX + 0.3, RZ + 0.7, 0, 2.00, C_REMOTE, C_MAIN); await sleep(130); await addFloor(RX + 1.0, RZ - 0.5, 0, 1.20, C_REMOTE, C_MAIN); await sleep(2600); // ── Beat 9: both sides visible ────────────────────────────────────────────── panTo(0, 0.8, 0, 1000); say('GitHub is your project\'s permanent address on the internet. Anyone with the link can browse your full commit history.'); await sleep(3000); // ── Beat 10: done ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── clearTerm(); say('Local is where you build. Remote is where you share. Every commit is a floor — and now the whole city is live on GitHub.'); $('cursor').style.display = 'none'; await sleep(700); $('replay').classList.add('show'); } $('replay').addEventListener('click', run); window.addEventListener('load', run);
